templates.title: Discovery call recap
templates.purpose: Send within 24 hours of every discovery call.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Thank you for sharing where things stand at [Organization]. What I heard: [pain points]. The finish line you described: [desired outcome].

Based on that, I recommend our [Package] package ([hours] hrs/month) because [reason].

Next step: [next step]. Does [date] work to reconnect?

With you in the mission,
[Your name] — Pure Water Automations

templates.title: Agreement send
templates.purpose: Goes with the client agreement email.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

It was a joy to talk. As promised, here is your service agreement for the [Package] package — [hours] hours/month at $[price]/month.

Sign online in about two minutes: [signature link]. Once signed and the first invoice is settled, we schedule your onboarding call the same week.

Questions? Just reply — I read everything.

[Your name] — Pure Water Automations

templates.title: Warm payment reminder
templates.purpose: For signed agreements awaiting first payment.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Wonderful to have [Organization] on board! A gentle note that the first invoice ($[price]) is still open — the payment link is here: [payment link].

As soon as it lands we lock in your onboarding call and your team gets moving.

Grateful for you,
[Your name]

templates.title: Monthly check-in
templates.purpose: Keep relationships warm — send monthly or after quiet stretches.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Quick check-in from your PWA team. This month we completed [highlights] ([hours used] of [hours] hours).

Two questions:
1. What felt most valuable?
2. What is one thing on your plate we should take over next?

Always in your corner,
[Your name]

templates.title: Package upgrade pitch
templates.purpose: When a client keeps hitting their hours ceiling.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Your team has used [hours used] of [hours] hours for the third month running — a great sign that the support is working, and a signal you may be leaving needs unmet.

Moving from [Current] to [Next] ([next hours] hrs/month) adds [difference] for $[delta]/month more. Most teams use the room for [suggestions].

Want me to sketch what the expanded scope would cover? No pressure either way.

[Your name]

templates.title: Nurture re-engage
templates.purpose: For nurture-stage leads when their season changes.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

When we last spoke, [timing reason] — so I set a reminder for now.

Since then we have helped [similar org] free up [X] hours a week. If the season is right, I would love to pick the conversation back up. 15 minutes: [booking link].

Either way, praying the work is going well.

[Your name]

templates.title: Testimonial request
templates.purpose: Sales or marketing sends after a strong win or milestone.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Watching [Organization] hand off [work area] has been a privilege. Would you be open to sharing 2–3 sentences on what changed for you since we started?

We feature a few client words on our site — and your story would encourage other leaders carrying too much.

Thank you for considering it!
[Your name]

templates.title: Referral thank-you
templates.purpose: Send the same day a referral comes in.
templates.body:
Hi [First name],

Thank you for introducing us to [Referred name] — that trust means everything.

We will take wonderful care of them. I will keep you posted, and as a small thank-you, [thank-you gesture].

Gratefully,
[Your name]
